subcodes.first_line: Hath anyone partaken of the Ocean of Life and remained silent in utterance, or hath he attained unto it yet remained among the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل شرب احد من بحر الحیوان و صمت عن البیان او مافاز به و کان من الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @living waters; water of life, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
